title: aria nivea var. glabrata
intro: Aria nivea var. glabrata, also known as White Chrysanthemum, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids, which have been shown to have antioxidant, anti-cancer, and anti-inflammatory effects. Herbal preparations of Aria nivea var. glabrata, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, can be used to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems.
